mapper.select: with days as ( select generate_series(current_date - interval '6 day', current_date, interval '1 day')::date as day ) select d.day, coalesce(( select sum(w.view_count) from tbl_work w where w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' and w.created_datetime::date = d.day ), 0) as view_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from tbl_like l join tbl_work w on l.target_type = 'WORK' and l.target_id = w.id where w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' and l.created_datetime::date = d.day ), 0) as like_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_work w on b.target_type = 'WORK' and b.target_id = w.id left join tbl_gallery g on b.target_type = 'GALLERY' and b.target_id = g.id where b.created_datetime::date = d.day and ( (b.target_type = 'WORK' and w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED') or (b.target_type = 'GALLERY' and g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED') ) ), 0) as save_count from days d order by d.day asc

select w.title, case when a.status = 'ACTIVE' then '입찰 ' || a.bid_count || '건 · 현재 최고가 ₩' || to_char(coalesce(a.current_price, a.starting_price), 'FM999,999,999') when a.status = 'SOLD' then '낙찰 완료 · 최종가 ₩' || to_char(coalesce(a.final_price, a.current_price, a.asking_price), 'FM999,999,999') when a.status = 'CLOSED' then '마감 완료 · 결과 확인 필요' else '상태: ' || a.status end as description from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id where a.seller_id = #{memberId} order by case when a.status = 'ACTIVE' then 0 else 1 end, a.closing_at asc, a.created_datetime desc limit 5

select w.title, case when bid.is_winning then '최고 입찰 유지 · 현재가 ₩' || to_char(coalesce(a.current_price, bid.bid_price), 'FM999,999,999') else '내 입찰가 ₩' || to_char(bid.bid_price, 'FM999,999,999') || ' · 현재 최고가 ₩' || to_char(coalesce(a.current_price, bid.bid_price), 'FM999,999,999') end as description from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id join lateral ( select b.bid_price, b.is_winning, b.created_datetime from tbl_bid b where b.auction_id = a.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} order by b.created_datetime desc limit 1 ) bid on true order by case when a.status = 'ACTIVE' then 0 else 1 end, a.closing_at asc, bid.created_datetime desc limit 5

select 'WORK' as tag, false as gold_tag, w.title, '작가 ' || writer.nickname || ' · 저장일 ' || to_char(b.created_datetime, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as description, null as amount from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_work w on b.target_type = 'WORK' and b.target_id = w.id join tbl_member writer on w.member_id = writer.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' order by b.created_datetime desc limit 5

select '작품' as tag, false as gold_tag, w.title, '조회수 ' || w.view_count || ' · 좋아요 ' || w.like_count as description, null as amount from tbl_work w where w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' order by (w.view_count + w.like_count + w.save_count) desc, w.created_datetime desc limit 5

select c.title, case when c.entry_end >= current_date then '참여작 ' || c.entry_count || '개 · 접수 마감 ' || to_char(c.entry_end, 'MM.DD') when c.result_date is not null then '심사 진행중 · 결과 발표 ' || to_char(c.result_date, 'MM.DD') else '마감 완료 · 참여작 ' || c.entry_count || '개' end as description from tbl_contest c where c.member_id = #{memberId} and c.deleted_datetime is null and c.status != 'DELETED' order by c.created_datetime desc limit 5

select c.title, case when c.result_date is not null then '출품 완료 · 결과 발표 ' || to_char(c.result_date, 'MM.DD') else '출품 완료 · 접수 마감 ' || to_char(c.entry_end, 'MM.DD') end as description from tbl_contest_entry ce join tbl_contest c on ce.contest_id = c.id where ce.member_id = #{memberId} and c.deleted_datetime is null and c.status != 'DELETED' order by ce.submitted_at desc limit 5

select '작품' as tag, true as gold_tag, g.title, case when g.status = 'EXHIBITING' then '전시중 · 작품 ' || g.work_count || '개' when g.status = 'SCHEDULED' then '전시 예정 · 오픈 준비중' when g.status = 'ENDED' then '전시 종료 · 다시 공개 가능' else '상태: ' || g.status end as description from tbl_gallery g where g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED' order by case when g.status = 'EXHIBITING' then 0 when g.status = 'SCHEDULED' then 1 else 2 end, g.updated_datetime desc limit 5

select case when p.status = 'COMPLETED' then '판매완료' when p.status in ('PENDING', 'AUTHORIZED') then '정산대기' when p.status = 'REFUNDED' then '환불완료' else p.status end as tag, w.title, to_char(coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime), 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' · 판매가 ₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as description, '₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as amount from tbl_payment p join tbl_work w on p.work_id = w.id where p.seller_id = #{memberId} order by coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime) desc limit 5

select case when p.status = 'COMPLETED' then '구매완료' when p.status in ('PENDING', 'AUTHORIZED') then '구매대기' when p.status = 'REFUNDED' then '환불완료' else p.status end as tag, w.title, to_char(coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime), 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' · 구매가 ₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as description, '₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as amount from tbl_payment p join tbl_work w on p.work_id = w.id where p.buyer_id = #{memberId} order by coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime) desc limit 5

select case when p.status = 'REFUNDED' then '이관' else '보관' end as tag, w.title, to_char(coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime), 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' · 보관가 ₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as description, '₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as amount from tbl_payment p join tbl_work w on p.work_id = w.id where p.buyer_id = #{memberId} and p.status in ('COMPLETED', 'REFUNDED') order by coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime) desc limit 5

select p.id as target_id, case when p.buyer_id = #{memberId} and p.status in ('PENDING', 'AUTHORIZED') then '결제대기' when p.auction_id is not null then '입찰결제' when p.buyer_id = #{memberId} then '구매내역' else '판매정산대상' end as tag, case when p.buyer_id = #{memberId} then coalesce(w.title, '삭제된 작품') || ' 결제' else coalesce(w.title, '삭제된 작품') || ' 판매' end as title, to_char(coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime), 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' · ' || p.pay_method || ' · ' || p.status as description, '₩' || to_char(p.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') as amount, case when p.buyer_id = #{memberId} and p.status in ('PENDING', 'AUTHORIZED') then '/payment/pay-api?paymentId=' || p.id else null end as action_url from tbl_payment p left join tbl_work w on p.work_id = w.id where p.buyer_id = #{memberId} or p.seller_id = #{memberId} order by coalesce(p.paid_at, p.created_datetime) desc limit 5

select to_char(s.created_datetime, 'MM') || '월 정산' as title, case when s.status = 'PAID' then '정산 완료 · 지급일 ' || to_char(s.paid_at, 'MM.DD') when s.status = 'APPROVED' then '승인 완료 · 지급 대기중' when s.status = 'REJECTED' then '반려됨 · 사유 확인 필요' else '승인 대기 · 예상 정산금 ₩' || to_char(s.net_amount, 'FM999,999,999') end as description from tbl_settlement s where s.member_id = #{memberId} order by s.created_datetime desc limit 5

select coalesce(( select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b left join tbl_work w on b.target_type = 'WORK' and b.target_id = w.id left join tbl_gallery g on b.target_type = 'GALLERY' and b.target_id = g.id where (b.target_type = 'WORK' and w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED') or (b.target_type = 'GALLERY' and g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED') ), 0) as received_bookmark_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from tbl_notification n where n.member_id = #{memberId} and n.is_read = false ), 0) as unread_notification_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from tbl_auction_wishlist aw join tbl_auction a on aw.auction_id = a.id where a.seller_id = #{memberId} ), 0) as auction_wishlist_count
select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_work w on b.target_type = 'WORK' and b.target_id = w.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED'
select count(*) from tbl_work where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
select count(*) from tbl_gallery where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
select count(*) from tbl_contest where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
select count(*) from tbl_card where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null

select wv.viewed_at::date as day, count(*)::bigint as count from tbl_work_view wv join tbl_work w on wv.work_id = w.id where w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' and wv.viewed_at::date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by wv.viewed_at::date order by day asc

select b.created_datetime::date as day, count(*)::bigint as count from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_work w on b.target_type = 'WORK' and b.target_id = w.id where b.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' and b.created_datetime::date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by b.created_datetime::date order by day asc

select w.created_datetime::date as day, count(*)::bigint as count from tbl_work w where w.member_id = #{memberId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' and w.created_datetime::date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by w.created_datetime::date order by day asc

select g.created_datetime::date as day, count(*)::bigint as count from tbl_gallery g where g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED' and g.created_datetime::date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by g.created_datetime::date order by day asc
